ListPreference.android:title: Creative Look
ListPreference.android:summary: Sony Alpha color science profiles. Controls color rendering, contrast, and tone for stills and video.

ListPreference.android:title: Cinema Profile
ListPreference.android:summary: CineAlta-derived video grading profiles (S-Cinetone, S-Log, HLG variants).

ListPreference.android:title: Still HDR
ListPreference.android:summary: Multi-exposure HDR for stills. Merges frames for extended dynamic range. Higher = more aggressive.

SwitchPreference.android:title: Multi-Frame Noise Reduction
SwitchPreference.android:summary: Stacks frames to reduce noise (BIONZ-derived). Best for low light stills. May increase capture time.

SwitchPreference.android:title: High Quality Snapshot
SwitchPreference.android:summary: Enhanced still pipeline with additional sharpening and color processing. Higher quality JPEGs.

ListPreference.android:title: Eye AF
ListPreference.android:summary: Alpha-derived real-time eye tracking. Locks focus on human or animal eyes.

SwitchPreference.android:title: Scene Detection
SwitchPreference.android:summary: AI scene recognition (people, food, landscape). Optimizes exposure, WB, and color automatically.

SwitchPreference.android:title: Condition Detection
SwitchPreference.android:summary: Detects shooting conditions (backlight, low light, motion) and adjusts parameters.

SwitchPreference.android:title: Video HDR
SwitchPreference.android:summary: Real-time multi-frame HDR for video. Extends dynamic range. May affect framerate.

SwitchPreference.android:title: Video ISO Smoothing
SwitchPreference.android:summary: Smooths ISO transitions during recording. Prevents abrupt brightness jumps.

ListPreference.android:title: Video Stabilization (Sony)
ListPreference.android:summary: Standard=OIS+EIS. Active=additional gyro stabilization with tighter crop for handheld.

ListPreference.android:title: Super Resolution Zoom
ListPreference.android:summary: AI upscaling beyond optical range. Mode 2 = more aggressive enhancement.
